summary: Nagarik AI Incident Replay with Multi-Signal Overlays fully tested. Backend: 10/10 tests PASSED covering risk_overlay data structure (location_risk, environment_risk, behavior_score). Frontend: All UI components verified including RISK SIGNALS Recharts AreaChart with 3 signal lines, playback cursor synchronization, and all interactive controls.

risk_overlay_structure: test_frames_contain_risk_overlay - PASS: All 180 frames contain risk_overlay
test_risk_overlay_has_required_fields - PASS: location_risk, environment_risk, behavior_score present
test_risk_overlay_values_are_numeric - PASS: All values are int/float
test_risk_overlay_values_in_valid_range - PASS: All values within 0-10 domain
risk_overlay_semantics: test_location_risk_default_zero - PASS: 0 for all frames (no nearby risk zones)
test_risk_overlay_consistent_across_frames - PASS: No sudden jumps between frames
chart_data_format: test_risk_overlay_chart_data_array - PASS: Chart data transformable (120 sample points)
integration: test_full_replay_response_structure - PASS: Complete response with risk_overlay in all frames

sample_risk_overlay_data.notes: location_risk=0 (no nearby risk zones), environment_risk=3.0 (early morning 6:45am fallback), behavior_score=0 (no anomalies)

frontend.incident_replay_viewer: PASS - Opens from Command Center Replay button
frontend.map_component: PASS - Leaflet map with device position marker

structure.location_risk: float 0-10, computed from proximity to location_risk_zones
structure.environment_risk: float 0-10, from env telemetry or time-based fallback

computation.location_risk: _compute_location_risk() using haversine distance to risk zones
computation.environment_risk: _compute_environment_risk() with time-based fallback: night=5.5, peak_heat=4.0, early_morning=3.0, normal=2.0

frontend_risk_signals_chart.interactivity: onClick handler jumps to frame on chart click

mocked_apis.ai_narrative: Falls back to template when Emergent LLM Key balance is low

critical_code_review_comments: Backend replay engine correctly generates risk_overlay for each frame at 5s intervals
Location risk computation uses haversine distance with 500m proximity threshold
Environment risk has sensible time-based fallback (night=5.5, early_morning=3.0)
Behavior score scales anomaly_score (0-1) to 0-10 range
Frontend Recharts AreaChart renders 3 gradient-filled area lines
Playback cursor (ReferenceLine) synchronizes with frame index via chartData lookup
Chart onClick handler allows jumping to specific frame by clicking on chart
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Incident Replay with Multi-Signal Overlays complete. Key points: 1) risk_overlay object added to each frame with location_risk, environment_risk, behavior_score (all 0-10), 2) RISK SIGNALS chart uses Recharts AreaChart with 3 colored area lines (red=location, blue=environment, purple=behavior), 3) Playback cursor is amber dashed ReferenceLine that syncs with current frame, 4) Chart is interactive - clicking on it jumps to that frame, 5) For test incident, location_risk=0 (no risk zones), environment_risk=3 (early morning fallback), behavior_score=0 (no anomalies)
